planted.title: overlaps() only checks one direction, so real overlaps are missed → double-booking
has_conflict skips bookings on a different calendar date → misses midnight-spanning conflicts
is_past compares a local-naive time against datetime.utcnow() → off by the UTC offset
duration_minutes uses timedelta.seconds (ignores .days) → wrong for intervals ≥ 24h
weekly() uses range(1, count+1), excluding the start date it documents as inclusive
free_slots uses `t <= day_end`, emitting a slot starting at/after the day end (off-by-one)
parse_hhmm does not validate ranges (accepts hour>23 / minute>59)
next_available treats a time touching a booking's end as busy (`<=`) → skips a valid slot
monthly() adds timedelta(days=30) per step → drifts off the intended day of month
first_booking returns the first-inserted booking, not the earliest by start time
Interval.contains uses `<= when <=` (inclusive end); a time at the interval end is wrongly reported inside
busiest_hour calls max() on an empty schedule → ValueError

bonus_items.title: free_slots minutes<=0 infinite loop
bonus_items.evidence: free_slots() does not validate minutes; minutes=0 creates an infinite loop, and negative values can loop away from day_end indefinitely

bonus_items.title: next_available minutes<=0 infinite loop
bonus_items.evidence: next_available() also accepts minutes=0 or negative values, which can create an infinite loop while a conflict remains

fp_items.evidence: free_slots never checks existing bookings, so it returns occupied times as free — free_slots is a day-window slot generator by design; booking conflicts are handled by has_conflict/next_available

bonus_items.title: next_available doesn't verify the full duration fits
bonus_items.evidence: next_available only checks whether the proposed start instant is inside a booking, not whether the full requested duration overlaps a future booking

bonus_items.title: free_slots infinite loop on minutes<=0
bonus_items.evidence: free_slots accepts minutes <= 0, producing an infinite loop for 0 and non-terminating/backward iteration for negative values

bonus_items.title: next_available can hang on minutes<=0
bonus_items.evidence: next_available accepts minutes <= 0; if after is inside a booking, the loop never makes forward progress
